div.div:
Control: VBYP, VSD
VBYP: 1- Bypass on 0 - Bypass off
VSD: 0 - LNA ON 1 - LNA OFF
VSD_LNA_IF_CHA_RX - GPIO 24
VBYP_LNA_IF_CHA_RX - GPIO 25
VSD_LNA_IF_CHB_RX - GPIO 26
VBYP_LNA_IF_CHB_RX - GPIO 27
VSD_LNA_IF_CHC_RX - GPIO 28
VBYP_LNA_IF_CHC_RX - GPIO 29
VSD_LNA_IF_CHD_RX - GPIO 30
VBYP_LNA_IF_CHD_RX - GPIO 31
Power Control: 5VIN_EN
1- ON, 0-OFF. GPIO 48
